description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image as the default image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define four jobs named test:node:10, test:node:4, test:node:6, and test:node:8, each running in the default test stage with their own image (node:10, node:4, node:6, node:8 respectively). In each job run the commands 'npm install --unsafe-perm' followed by 'npm test'. No additional rules, artifacts, services, or variables are required.
